name: Jellyfin Enhanced
overview: Jellyfin Enhanced and Jellyfin Elsewhere for a better Jellyfin experience.
description: A combination of the Jellyfin Enhanced and Jellyfin Elsewhere userscripts, providing a comprehensive set of tweaks and features for Jellyfin.

versions.changelog:
- fix: duplicate approval notifications and un-approvable pending requests on available shows ([#658](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/658))
 - feat: centralize Seerr status logic in seerr-status.js
 - README: fix: Seerr URL ([#664](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/664))
 - docs: Formatting fixes ([#666](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/666))
 - fix: pick richest audio layout instead of first match in getChannelTag
 - fix: skip synthetic je:navigate event for no-op pushState/replaceState calls ([#657](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/657))
 - fix: allow Administrator API keys to access any user's settings files
 - feat: add admin-scoped write endpoints for reviews and bookmarks
 - chore(ci)(deps): bump actions/checkout from 6.0.3 to 7.0.0 ([#671](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/671))
 - chore(ci)(deps): bump trufflesecurity/trufflehog from 3.95.5 to 3.95.6 in the github-actions group ([#670](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/670))
 - fix: show Request More button when only specials season is unrequested
 - feat: add letterboxd link for people details pages
 - feat: show release/air date chip on item detail pages ([#661](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/661))
 - fix: show MusicVideo bookmarks in the Bookmarks Library
 - fix: skip Report Issue button entirely for non-reportable item types
 - feat: Jellyfin 12 compatibility ([#681](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/681))
 - Load Material Symbols Rounded for release icons
 - Show API keys in config form
 - chore(ci)(deps): bump the github-actions group with 2 updates ([#682](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/682))
 - chore(ci)(deps): bump actions/cache from 5.0.5 to 6.1.0 ([#683](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/683))
 - Admin visibility and management of user-hidden content + bug fixes ([#684](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/684))
 - feat: reliable Remove from Continue Watching + add Remove from Next Up (multi-select & confirm) ([#685](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/685))
 - fix: don't require both Sonarr and Radarr for Requests Page ([#689](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/689))
 - feat(spoiler-guard): per-user opt-in spoiler protection for unwatched content (Jellyfin 10.11 + 12) ([#691](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/691))
 - chore(ci)(deps): bump the github-actions group with 4 updates ([#696](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/696))
 - Fix MutationObserver leak in addUserPreferencesLink (one observer piled up per navigation) ([#694](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/694))
 - feat: serve third-party assets from a local CDN cache (+ off-thread tag-cache updates) ([#692](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/692))
 - feat(spoiler-guard): per-user image identity tags for native clients ([#700](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/700))
 - fix(jellyseerr): stop runaway search requests after leaving search page
 - fix(requests-tab): stop polling when a sibling home tab becomes active
 - fix(native-tabs): only log "not on home page" once per transition
 - fix(jellyseerr): sort server dropdown alphabetically, fix default selection
 - style(jellyseerr): restyle season/collection checkboxes as toggle switches
 - chore(ci)(deps): bump the github-actions group with 6 updates ([#703](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/703))
 - fix(tag-cache): stop re-saving the whole cache on no-op library events ([#704](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/704))
 - fix(tags): fix ignore-selector checks matching the wrong element
 - fix(perf): cap concurrent requests for provider and review fetches
 - feat(shortcuts): allow disabling individual keyboard shortcuts
 - feat(jellyseerr): add Seerr detail-page link with More Info modal integration
 - chore(ci)(deps): bump actions/setup-python from 6.3.0 to 7.0.0 ([#710](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/710))
 - chore(ci)(deps): bump the github-actions group with 3 updates ([#709](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/709))
 - chore(ci)(deps): bump actions/setup-dotnet from 5.4.0 to 6.0.0 ([#712](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/712))
 - chore(ci)(deps): bump actions/setup-node from 6.4.0 to 7.0.0 ([#711](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/711))
 - Fix rating normalization logic
 - fix(tags): memory-bounded tag cache builds + honor Server-Side Tag Cache setting (startup OOM crash loop) ([#713](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/713))
 - docs: API overhaul ([#668](https://github.com/n00bcodr/Jellyfin-Enhanced/issues/668))
 - docs: fix bookmark JSON casing and auth header per live server verification

name: JavaScript Injector
overview: Inject custom javascript(s) to the Jellyfin Web UI
description: Inject custom javascript(s) to the Jellyfin Web UI

versions.changelog: - Add search, drag-reorder, import/export, and unsaved-changes guard to config page

name: Jellyfin Tweaks
description: Adds useful tweaks to Jellyfin. Based on the original JellyTweaks by gam24.

versions.changelog:
- Revise installation instructions for Jellyfin plugins
 - Add display and video settings to plugin configuration
 - v3.1.0.0
